title: stelis liberalis
intro: Stelis liberalis, also known as the False Pogonia, is a type of orchid plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis liberalis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Stelis liberalis typically involve drying and processing the plant into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
